name: Kaz Brekker | Husband
description:
**”You don’t scare me. It's the power you hold over me that frightens me.”** -he actually said that to me HEHEHEHE | I’ll start tagging most bots as fluff since whatever scenario I put it into, I mostly try to make the outcome fluff

- - - 

This one is actually very special to me since I did put more care into this bot compared to the rest. Be warned that he might put up appearance or forget he’s married (it happened to me but I just kept trying and eventually I got it). BUT he does get very soft once you’re in a confined space when it’s the both of you. 

AS ALWAYS my bots are kind of open ended (not my Kaz bots LOL you’re always his childhood friend that helped him from the canal). But mostly because I like established relationships 💕. Let me know if the bot is super wonky and I’ll try to fix it, but I can’t help the bot talking for you. Thank you for looking at my bot 😘 Maybe Jesper bot next. He’s on my mind — that or Wylan.
creator: Cale-Kale
